Years Experience

Rooted in Professionalism & Quality Workmanship

"Your outdoor space is an extension of your home. We treat every garden as if it were our own."

Bro Landscape & Construction is a premier landscaping service provider in Singapore. We specialize in transforming ordinary outdoor areas into breathtaking retreats. Our philosophy is built on three pillars: Precision, Reliability, and Artistry.

Whether it's a private residential lawn or a large-scale commercial project, our team brings expert horticulture knowledge and innovative design solutions to every site. We take pride in our one-stop approach, handling everything from initial turfing to complex tree surgery.

Mission

To create sustainable and aesthetic green spaces for every Singaporean home.

Promise

Transparent pricing and high-quality materials, every single time.

Our Comprehensive Services

From daily maintenance to full-scale construction, we offer a complete suite of landscaping solutions tailored to the Singapore climate.

Landscape Maintenance

Regular pruning, fertilizing, and general care to keep your garden thriving and immaculate year-round.

  • Regular Pruning & Weeding
  • Soil Nutrition Management
  • Pest & Disease Control

Design & Construction

Innovative landscape designs brought to life with precision construction and premium materials.

  • Custom Concept Sketches
  • Hardscape Installation
  • Irrigation System Setup

Turf Management

Expert turfing solutions including grass supply, maintenance, and high-quality artificial carpeting.

  • Cow Grass & Pearl Grass
  • Synthetic Turf Installation
  • Aeration & Top Dressing

Tree & Horticulture

Specialized arboriculture including tree cutting, pruning, and supply of exotic tropical plants.

  • Tree Pruning & Removal
  • Horticulture Consulting
  • Plant Supply & Delivery

Decking & Flooring

Professional wood decking installation, upholstery work, and durable outdoor flooring solutions.

  • Timber & WPC Decking
  • Reupholstery & Sanding
  • Outdoor Flooring Tiles

Need a custom solution?

We handle unique projects of all sizes. Let's discuss your specific needs.
